projectDescription: A Django web application for searching airports by IATA/ICAO code, managing favorite airports, calculating distances between airports, and comparing airport details using the AirportGap API.
keyFeatures: Airport search by IATA or ICAO code
Favorites management — save and remove airports with personal notes
Integration with the AirportGap REST API
publicApiSurface: POST / — Search airport by IATA/ICAO code
POST /favoritos/agregar/ — Add an airport to favorites
POST /favoritos/eliminar/<id>/ — Remove an airport from favorites
POST /distancia/ — Calculate distance between two airports
POST /comparar/ — Compare two airports by IATA/ICAO codes
